title: renistipula costaricensis
intro: Renistipula costaricensis, also known as the Costa Rican renistipula or Renistipula, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Renistipula costaricensis include its ability to treat fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and combat infections. Herbal preparations of Renistipula costaricensis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves or roots, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to apply its medicinal properties.
